# Blockquote

A blockquote component for displaying quoted content with optional attribution. Built with composable sub-components for flexible layouts.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  Blockquote,
  BlockquoteContent,
  BlockquoteCaption,
  BlockquoteIcon,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Blockquote` | Root container for the blockquote |
| `BlockquoteContent` | The quoted text content |
| `BlockquoteCaption` | Attribution or source caption |
| `BlockquoteIcon` | Optional decorative icon (e.g., quotation mark) |

## Props

### Blockquote (Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"subtle" \| "solid" \| "plain"` | `"subtle"` | The visual style variant |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"gray"` | The color palette to use |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Blockquote>
  <BlockquoteContent>
    The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
  </BlockquoteContent>
  <BlockquoteCaption>Nelson Mandela</BlockquoteCaption>
</Blockquote>
```

### With icon

```jsx
<Blockquote>
  <BlockquoteIcon />
  <BlockquoteContent>
    Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
  </BlockquoteContent>
  <BlockquoteCaption>Steve Jobs</BlockquoteCaption>
</Blockquote>
```

### Variants

```jsx
<Blockquote variant="subtle">
  <BlockquoteContent>Subtle blockquote</BlockquoteContent>
</Blockquote>

<Blockquote variant="solid">
  <BlockquoteContent>Solid blockquote</BlockquoteContent>
</Blockquote>

<Blockquote variant="plain">
  <BlockquoteContent>Plain blockquote</BlockquoteContent>
</Blockquote>
```

### With color palette

```jsx
<Blockquote colorPalette="blue" variant="solid">
  <BlockquoteContent>
    A blue-themed solid blockquote.
  </BlockquoteContent>
</Blockquote>
```

## Features

- Composable sub-components for flexible blockquote layouts
- Supports 3 visual variants: subtle, solid, and plain
- Supports color palettes for themed styling
- Optional decorative icon via `BlockquoteIcon`
- Optional attribution via `BlockquoteCaption`
- Forwards refs on all sub-components
